title: callitriche ciliata
intro: Callitriche ciliata, also known as fringe water-plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and may also have anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used in infusions or capsules.
